properties.titulo_evento: Multibillion-dollar contract secures ‘major step forward’ for GCAP fighter jet
properties.descricao: Japan, Italy and the U.K. have handed a £4.6 billion ($6.1 billion) development contract to their national champions building the GCAP jet.

properties.descricao: The agreement with Madrid will allow Warsaw to increase its tanker order to four units.

properties.descricao: Iran's foreign minister corroborated US media reports that Washington warned Tehran Israel may have had its chief negotiators on a target list during April talks in Islamabad, the same talks that produced the framework deal signed on 17 June.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela's interim leader defends earthquake response as death toll tops 2,500

properties.descricao: NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte is working to keep the alliance united and Donald Trump engaged. But disputes over burden sharing, US military commitments, and the Iran war are creating a major test for NATO unity.

properties.titulo_evento: Kielce pogrom in Poland: 80th anniversary of 1946 massacre
properties.descricao: Just over a year after World War II ended, a mob in the Polish city of Kielce killed around 40 Jews, some of them Holocaust survivors. A lie about ritual child murder escalated the violence.

properties.descricao: The NATO alliance's European members and Canada have signaled a readiness to fully take over the financing of Ukraine's fight against Russia.

properties.titulo_evento: Far-right AfD threatens eastern Germany's energy transition
properties.descricao: Germany's far-right AfD wants to revive coal and nuclear power and curb non-EU immigration. Businesses in eastern Germany warn that its policies could harm the economy.
